---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for HanoBus
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?
A clear and concise description of the problem. Example: "I often miss my bus because I can't tell how full it is before it arrives at my stop."

## Describe the solution you'd like
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Describe alternatives you've considered
Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've thought about.

## Additional context
Add any other context, mockups, screenshots, or links about the feature request here.
